protein_name: Belongs to the universal ribosomal protein uS10 family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytoplasm; cytosol; cytosolic ribosome; cytosolic small ribosomal subunit; endoplasmic reticulum; nucleoplasm; ribonucleoprotein complex; ribosome; small ribosomal subunit; synapse
raw_fields.Molecular Function: MDM2/MDM4 family protein binding; protein binding; RNA binding; structural constituent of ribosome; ubiquitin ligase inhibitor activity
raw_fields.Biological Process: cytoplasmic translation; positive regulation of signal transduction by p53 class mediator; translation
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: 40S ribosomal protein S20; FLJ27451; MGC102930; ribosomal protein S20; RPS20; RS20; S20; Small ribosomal subunit protein uS10; uS10
